pairs.value: Forge 模組列表檢查失敗！

pairs.key: Forge ModList checking failed, via exception!
pairs.value: Forge 模組列表檢查失敗，異常導致！

pairs.key: not to be confused with CIT, seriously, why does that keep happening?
pairs.value: 別和 CIT 搞混了，說真的，為什麼這種事總會發生？

pairs.key: the worst server plugin one guy on my discord has ever seen!
pairs.value: 這是我 Discord 上有個人見過的最爛伺服器外掛！

pairs.key: your third cousin's, dog's, previous owner's, uncle's, old boss's, fourth favourite mod!
pairs.value: 你表親的狗的前主人的叔叔的前老闆最喜歡的第四個模組！
感謝突破 1000 萬次下載！！

pairs.key: why does no one download Solid Mobs :(
pairs.value: 為什麼沒人下載 Solid Mobs :(

pairs.key: breaking your resource packs since 17 Jan 2022.
pairs.value: 自 2022 年 1 月 17 日起一直在破壞你的資源包。

pairs.key: not fit for consumption in the US.
one of the mods ever made!
did you know if you turn off the lights and whisper 'OptiFine' 3 times you will lose 20fps.
pairs.value: 你知道嗎，如果你關掉燈並低聲念 3 次“OptiFine”，你就會損失 20fps。

pairs.key: OptiFine's weirder younger half-brother that runs around making train noises.
pairs.value: OptiFine 那個更古怪的弟弟，四處跑來跑去模仿火車聲音。

pairs.key: did you know this mod was made because I missed the glowing drowned textures in the Fresh animations addons.
pairs.value: 你知道嗎，這個模組誕生的原因是我懷念 Fresh animations addons 裡會發光的溺屍紋理。

pairs.key: Has Anyone Really Been Far Even as Decided to Use Even Go Want to do Look More Like?
pairs.value: 真的有人遠到甚至決定使用甚至去想要做看起來更像嗎？
